commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds author-facing Plugin Inspector remediation metadata across Convex storage/API, shared schema, CLI validation/publish output, plugin validation UI, findings emails, tests, and docs.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: the PR filters ingestion to findings with authorRemediation, while the nightly worker normalizes and posts findings without that field.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve remediation through the nightly worker, add focused coverage, and add the required spec note without a product decision.

target.title: feat: surface author remediation for plugin validation
target.body:
## Summary
- Store and expose author-facing Plugin Inspector remediation metadata across Convex, shared package schema, CLI output, plugin validation UI, and findings emails.
- Keep internal inspector findings hidden from author-facing `clawhub package validate`, public reads, UI counts, and email content.
- Add ClawHub-owned plugin validation fix docs so author remediation links point at actionable guidance.

## Proof

### UI and email proof
Captured from a real local ClawHub instance at `http://127.0.0.1:17812/plugins/local-scanned-runtime-plugin#validation` with admin persona and a local proof finding inserted through `packages:insertPackageInspectorWarningsInternal`.

![Plugin validation UI bare command proof](https://uploads.linear.app/f62397ba-7118-4506-b4a8-119d64e590a4/c8021149-bf14-4ebd-bbc0-4e652e637062/73b5a885-d554-42a0-b7a3-7c46e680fc2e?signature=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJwYXRoIjoiL2Y2MjM5N2JhLTcxMTgtNDUwNi1iNGE4LTExOWQ2NGU1OTBhNC9jODAyMTE0OS1iZjE0LTRlYmQtYmJjMC00ZTY1MmU2MzcwNjIvNzNiNWE4ODUtZDU1NC00MmEwLWI3YTMtN2M0NmU2ODBmYzJlIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgxMDYzMTgwLCJleHAiOjE3ODEwNjM0ODB9.UGXZqK3sHcnw0nZvpmnLEE5sN0j_ZCj9KapDi4sk10c)

Rendered from `buildPackageInspectorFindingsEmail` at `/tmp/plugin-inspector-author-remediation-email.html`.

![Plugin Inspector email bare command proof](https://uploads.linear.app/f62397ba-7118-4506-b4a8-119d64e590a4/6bea92c7-07b4-4e56-8089-1dcecfa436a8/570f9c11-d835-45f1-b3d1-590a007c4c8f?signature=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJwYXRoIjoiL2Y2MjM5N2JhLTcxMTgtNDUwNi1iNGE4LTExOWQ2NGU1OTBhNC82YmVhOTJjNy0wN2I0LTRlNTYtODA4OS0xZGNlY2ZhNDM2YTgvNTcwZjljMTEtZDgzNS00NWYxLWIzZDEtNTkwYTAwN2M0YzhmIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgxMDYzMTgwLCJleHAiOjE3ODEwNjM0ODB9.tiSy_dN_udg7OULfxbudKRCzTves94Lv2cV-sXvtk3A)

### Local verification
```bash
bun run test -- convex/lib/emails.test.ts convex/packageInspectorNode.test.ts src/__tests__/package-detail-route.test.tsx
```
```text
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests       30 passed (30)
```

```bash
bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src -- src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts
```
```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       65 passed (65)
```

```bash
bun run test -- convex/packages.public.test.ts
```
```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       206 passed (206)
```

```bash
bun run ci:static
bun run ci:unit
bun run ci:packages
bun run ci:types-build
```
All passed locally. `ci:types-build` first exposed a stale local Bun install of `@tanstack/router-core`; after reinstalling with the lockfile (`bun install --frozen-lockfile --force`) the full gate passed.

```bash
git diff --check HEAD~1...HEAD
```
```text
# no whitespace errors
```

## Notes
- This is compatible with the currently pinned `@openclaw/plugin-inspector@0.3.12`; fallback author-remediation mappings keep the CLI/UI/email path actionable until the merged Plugin Inspector release is published and ClawHub can bump to it.
- Plugin Inspector remediation PR: https://github.com/openclaw/plugin-inspector/pull/35
- Linear proof rollup: https://linear.app/my-openclaw/issue/CLAW-251/03-update-clawhub-validation-ui-cli-and-emails-for-authorremediation#comment-833c70fe
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
